claim_text: Patient recently learned of elevated cholesterol levels.
Patient has a "borderline" cholesterol level reported in a previous visit.
Patient has no other notable symptoms.
Patient has a family history of premature heart disease.
A full cholesterol panel will be ordered.
Glucose, complete metabolic panel, thyroid studies, and liver panels will be ordered.
Genetic testing will be performed to assess familial cause.
Patient will follow-up with a nutritionist.
Patient will have another cholesterol level checked in 3-6 months after initiation of dietary changes.
